Getting the pre calculus question correct grants +15% Damage, +15% Range, and -5% CD to all units for 55s, but getting it incorrect gives all enemies 2x health for 15 waves. Getting the algebra question correct grants +5% Damage and +5% Range to all units for 8s, but getting it incorrect gives all enemies 2x health for 5 waves. changes.text:
● DMG increased to 1500 (was 1299)
● Attack type change to Cone 45° at lvl 10 and Cone 75° at lvl 16 (was Circle)

passives.title: Lumber Bot Shop (This does not appear in-game)
passives.text: Grants a shop used to craft Lumber Bots in exchange for varying amounts of Wood and Special Wood. You can have a max of 3 Bots at a time, and all Bots can attack and last 5 Waves. Lumber Bot 1.0: Costs 5 Wood and has low-end DPS. Lumber Bot 2.0: Costs 12 Wood and has low-mid-end DPS. Lumber Bot 3.0: Costs 20 Wood and 2 Special Wood, has mid-end DPS, and applies 3% Slow on hit. Lumber Bot 4.0: Costs 30 Wood and 5 Special Wood, has mid-high-end DPS, and 5% AOE Slow. Lumber Bot 5.0: Costs 45 Wood and 10 Special Wood, has high-end DPS, and 8% AOE Slow.

passives.title: Stock Stacker
passives.text: Boost scales from max stock: +0.5% Damage and +0.5% Range per stock (up to 10%). Nature units receive 3x this buff.

passives.title: Lumber Mill
passives.text: Generates 1 wood per attack. Has a chance to generate +1 extra wood (10% + 10% per nature unit, max 50%) and a chance to generate special wood (10% base + 2% per nature unit, bonus capped at 10%). Uses wood to craft temporary lumber bots.

passives.title: Lumber Co.
passives.text: This unit gains +0.1% damage per wood farmed (Max 50%). Placed lumber bots give +25% damage (Max 50%). Nature units in range receive 20% of these buffs.

name: Bones of The Past Nightmare Freddy

passives.title: Deathly Bones
passives.text: For every 5 kills his Freddles will have 5% more damage (caps extra 65%). Then every 25 deaths within its range he will permanently spawn in an extra fire freddles capping at 3 at a time.

passives.title: Freddles of Fire
passives.text: Every 20s, summon a Fire Freddle with half of this unit's damage as health.

passives.title: My Favorite Creation
passives.text: Boosts one unit in range with +65% Damage and +30% Range. (PvP: 2 units can be buffed and also have upgrade costs reduced by 25%) (Upgrade 0+, Local CD: 45s ).

passives.title: A World Under My Control
passives.text: Opens a chip selection screen. Pick 2 chips for permanent buffs and effects. (Upgrade 0+, Local CD: 1s).

passives.title: Alarm
passives.text: Every attack by this unit will be followed up with an attack that deal 10% of this unit's damage. Each repeat hit on the same enemy adds +10% damage to this follow up attack (max +50% damage). Enemies leaving range are hit by a neon wall for 250% of this unit's damage and receive a 2s Stun. Each Alarm activation buffs Animdude's damage by +2% (up to +100%).

passives.title: Familiar Tools
passives.text: Bonuses based on equipped byte: Box - every 10s rotates through Damage, Range and Cooldown and gives an extra 50% of the % the byte gives on that stat.  Boss Drain - attacks on bosses deal +10% damage and apply 10% Wither.  Reaper - executes non-boss enemies below 5% HP, +50% crit chance.  KABOOM! - every other attack toggles +50% damage and +30% range.  The Fan - -20% cooldown, every 10s next attack knocks enemies back 1.5 studs.

passives.title: Mini Rainbows
passives.text: Spawn a Mini Rainbow tower of a chosen element. Max one per element. You get +1 mini rainbow per missing unit slot. (Upgrade 0+, Local CD: 1s).

passives.title: I'M GONNA KILL YOU!
passives.text: When your last stock is taken by a non-boss, return that stock and fire a Rainbow Cannon dealing 999% damage and knocking back all enemies by 5 studs. Once per match.

passives.title: The Main Character!
passives.text: Gains 1 free upgrade every 7 waves (reduces by 2 waves per missing team slot, min 1 wave).  Each manual upgrade gives +10% damage permanently. Bonuses per empty team slot: 1 - +30% dmg | 2 - -25% placement cost, +50% dmg | 3 - -50% placement cost, +75% dmg, -10% cd | 4 - -75% placement cost, +100% dmg, -30% cd | 5 - Free placement, +200% dmg, -50% cd

passives.title: DO A BARREL ROLL!
passives.text: Barrel rolls down the track dealing 250% damage in a line. Foxy stops attacking for 3 seconds afterwards. (Upgrade 0+, Local CD: 15s).

passives.title: Bombs Away
passives.text: Every 8 seconds, drops a bomb on the track that explodes after 2.5 seconds dealing 125% damage and stunning enemies for 1.5s in a 4 stud radius. Each additional Foxy Fighter placed increases bomb damage by 15%.

passives.title: Biding Time
passives.text: Every other attack generates a stack. At 10 stack, Chica inflicts all enemies in her range with 50% Bleed for 5s. Then, she does a follow up attack dealing 5x her damage in 180° cone.

passives.title: Specialized Ammo
passives.text: All attacks inflict enemies with 50% Bleed for 5s. Bleeding enemies in her range are Marked and take 10% more damage from Rust unit. Enemies marked by follow up attacks only receive 10% Bleed. Bleed applied this way cannot be reapplied again.

passives.title: Make It Count
passives.text: This unit has 6 bullets, the attack that consumed the last bullet will apply 30% more Bleed before performing a followup attack. When at 0 ammo, fires a single target follow up attack that deals half damage on random enemies 5 times (marked enemies are prioritized max 2 hits per target). Afterwards, Purifier reloads and grants herself +50% Damage for 20s.

passives.title: Changing of Seasons
passives.text:
Changes form to the majority element in the team, chooses default if none are applicable (Multiple elements are equal).
● Neutral: +15% DMG, +10% RNG, -5% CD, gains +2% DMG, +1% RNG, and -1% CD per unique element (max 5).
● Nature: -10% DMG, +10% RNG, adds +1 stock, gains +20% DMG for 15s when losing a stock, and buffs teammates based on max stocks.
● Fire: +20% DMG, applies 20% burn, every 3 attacks detonates burns for 1.1x DMG, leaves lava pools on kill dealing 50% DMG and 10% burn over 3s.
● Water: Slows nearby enemies by 10%, creates whirlpools that slow and damage enemies, Water units deal 10% more DMG to whirlpooled enemies.
● Dark: +30% DMG, applies Fear up to 10% wither based on dark units, every 3rd hit on the same enemy deals 30% more damage.
● Light: +30% RNG, buffs nearby units to all stats (+5% for Light units), focuses the highest HP enemy dealing +20% damage while allies deal +5% to it.
● Rust: +15% DMG and RNG applies 10% wither, gains double wither value, attacks on withered enemies apply stacking slows up to 15%.
● Electric: -20% DMG, -10% CD, applies Static Shock dealing 7.5% DMG/s and triggering follow-up attacks on stunned enemies.

passives.title: Sprawling Roots
passives.text:
Attacks all enemies in 66% of range every 5s for 50% DMG. Effects change depending on the form.
● Nature: Roots deal double damage to enemies above 50% HP.
● Fire: Roots deal 70% DMG and apply 25% burn.
● Water: Spawns an additional whirlpool on the highest HP enemy.
● Dark: Gains +2% DMG per enemy in range.
● Light: Roots deal +100% DMG to the highest hp enemy.
● Rust: Roots attack every 10s, deal 120% DMG and apply 5% wither.
● Electric: Roots attack every 2.5s for 40% DMG and apply a 0.2s stun that bypasses stun cooldowns.

passives.title: Nature's Blessing
passives.text:
Gains boosts based on the number of units of the same element in the team (excluding self) requires 3/4/5 units respectively.
● Neutral: +1/2/5% DMG and RNG. Nature: +2/4/10% RNG.
● Fire: +3/6/12% DMG and burn.
● Water: -2/4/10% CD.
● Dark: +3/6/12% DMG.
● Light: +3/8/12% RNG.
● Rust: +1/2/5% DMG and RNG.
● Electric: -1/2/5% CD.

passives.title: Today's Sponsorship
passives.text: Michael throws a TV onto the track in range showing 1 of 5 possible ads. A max of 3 TVs can be placed at a time. Fiztime Pop Soda: Enemies move 10% faster but take 15% more damage from Rust units. Marty's Plungers: Enemies bleed for 15% of this units damage every second. Flo's Glossy Floss: The enemy and the next 4 closest enemies are stunned for 1.5 seconds. Wacky Wart Paste: Reduce enemies regen by 25% until death. Lally's Lollies: Enemies are slowed by 20% for 15 seconds. (Upgrade 1+, Local CD: 10s).

passives.title: Together Again
passives.text: When paired with Rust element units, Rust element units in range gain +30% damage, +25% range, and -10% cooldown. This unit receives these buffs and an additional +10% Damage and Range for each Rust unit on the team.

passives.title: Completing the Salvage
passives.text: When an enemy is killed within Michael's range, add their parts to his pile to make traps. Every 10s, Miachael creates a trap at a random place on the track. Traps deal 75% of Michael's current damage. Max 10 traps on the track per placement.

passives.title: Story Time
passives.text: Choose a story. Only one story buff can be active at a time and each lasts 30s. Orphans: Spend 1-5k cash for +20% to candy values for every 1k spent. Keys: Choose 1-5 keys for +30% to candy values per key. 100%/90%/75%/60%/40% success rate depending on amount of keys chosen. Kittens: Choose 1-5 kittens for +10% damage per kitten to units in range for 30s, then disable candy buffs for 3s per kitten. (Upgrade 0+, Local CD: 60s).

passives.title: Candy. Candy. Candy.
passives.text: On placement, select which type of candy to give units in range: Red candy: +30% damage and +10% range. Yellow candy: +30% range and +10% damage

passives.title: Play Time!
passives.text: Spend cash to unlock and select a minigame. Ballpit: Circle 150% damage and leaves balls on the track nearby that do damage. Riding Rockets: Line 120% damage and secondary single target pizza attack on the weakest enemy. Gravity Vortex: Full AoE 80% damage and -3% cooldown for every successful lawsuit avoided until lawsuit, then reset. (Upgrade 0+, Local CD: 0s).

passives.title: Lawsuit
passives.text: On placement this unit receives +50% Damage. Every 5s roll a chance for a lawsuit, starting at 10% and increasing by 5% per failed attempt. When lawsuit chance succeeds, disable this passive's damage buff for 15s

passives.title: Little Helper
passives.text: Units in range gain +5% damage and +5% range. When a unit in range attacks, Helpy does a follow up attack dealing 1% of his damage

passives.title: L.E.F.T.E
passives.text: Stun enemies in range for 5s and deal 250% damage. Enemies with stun lockout take 500% damage instead. Change this unit's target to Strongest and buff this unit's damage by 50% for 15s. If The Puppet is on the team, lower their damage by 25% for 15s and buff this unit's damage by an additional 50% for 15s. (Upgrade 0+, Global CD: 75s).

passives.title: Rare Finds
passives.text: Every wave this unit's upgrade cost is reduced by 25%, resetting on upgrade. When cost reduction reaches 100%, automatically upgrade this unit. For every other Rockstar unit on the team, cost reduction increases by an additional 25%, buff this unit's damage by 10%, and Rockstar units in range Gain 20% damage and Upgrade cost reduced by 20%.

passives.title: Music Box
passives.text: When selecting this unit, lowers this unit's cooldown by 10% for 30s. Puppet units on the team also receive this buff. If this unit is not selected for 60s, attack for 200% damage in a full AOE and stun enemies hit for 2s.

passives.title: Clobbering Time!
passives.text: Every other attack this unit performs a follow up attack for 75% damage and inflicts Breakable on enemies. Enemies inflicted with Breakable lose 1 additional shield from all sources.

passives.title: Hybrid
passives.text: When there are 3+ Rust element units on the team, this unit gains +25% Damage. When there are 5+ Rust element units on the team, this unit's follow-up attacks deal 15% more damage.

passives.title: Undead Encore
passives.text: While a Necromancer enemy or its summons are alive, this unit gains -25% CD.

passives.title: Heated Endo Skeleton
passives.text: Attacks inflict enemies with 20% Burn for 5s. If the enemy is already burning, inflict 30% Burn instead. Burning enemies in range are Slowed by 15%.

passives.title: Heat Seeking Tendrils
passives.text: When a burning enemy leaves this unit's range, deal 150% of this unit's damage, inflict it with 50% Burn for 5s, Stun it for 2s, and Slow it by 20% for 10s.

passives.title: All As One
passives.text: For each Rust or Fire element unit on the team, this unit gains +10% Damage. For each Molten Freddy in range, this unit gains +25% Damage.

passives.title: Shade's Presence
passives.text: Enemies take +2% damage from this unit and have -2% regen for every second they're in this unit's range.

passives.title: Ye win some, ye lose some!
passives.text: Upon activation, Rockstar Foxy will grant a random effect. These effects will be permanent unless otherwise stated. Positive Effects: 1 Stock, 1k Cash, 10k Cash, boosts the attack of all units by 15%, boosts the range of all units by 10%, reduces the cooldown of all units by 5%. Negative Effects: -1 Stock, -3 Stocks, 0.1% chance to reduce base HP to 1, reduces the attack of all units by 20% for 3 waves, increases the cooldown of all units by 10% for 5 waves. (Upgrade 0+, Local CD: 60s).

passives.title: Hidden Treasure
passives.text: Every 10 seconds, spawns a coin somewhere on the map. Every 30 seconds, auto collects 1 coin. Each coin picked up permanently gives +2% Damage and Range (max 20%) and +5% crit rate and crit damage. Max 10 coins held.

passives.title: Rockstars Assemble
passives.text: When 3 other Rockstar units are in the same loadout, this unit gains +25% Damage and Range.

passives.title: Withering Away
passives.text: Enemies in range receive 5% Wither that is increased to 10% Wither if they're Burning.

passives.title: Engulfing Flames
passives.text: Attacks inflict 10% Burn for 5s. Subsequent applications increase this Burn by 5% (Max 50%). For each burning enemy in range, this unit gains +5% Damage (max 50%).

passives.title: Opportune Strike
passives.text: This unit has +25% crit rate and +100% crit damage. Every 5th attack, this unit does a follow up attack that always crits. When a stunned enemy is in range, this unit does a follow up attack with +50% damage that always crits.

passives.title: Funeral Song of Fire
passives.text: Every 3rd attack, this unit performs a follow up attack that hits all enemies in range. Enemies hit by this follow-up attack are inflicted 50% Burn for 5s. Follow-up attacks permanently remove enemy DoT immunity.

passives.title: Harmonic Inferno
passives.text: When this unit's Burn expires on an enemy within this units range, inflict that enemy with 100% Burn for 10s.

passives.title: Ferocious Bite
passives.text: Once a regenerating enemy enters within 60% of this unit's range, permanently reduce that enemy's regen by 50%.

passives.title: Cleansing Solution
passives.text: Whenever a mystery enemy dies in this unit's range, the new enemy loses 30% of its max HP on spawn.

passives.title: Rockstars Assemble
passives.text: When 3 other rockstar animatronics are in the same loadout, this unit gains +15% Damage and +25% Range.

passives.title: Overheating
passives.text: Every 30s, this unit gains +50% Damage for 10s. When 1 Fire element is on team, this buff increases to +75%, then to +100% if 2 or more Fire units are on the team.

passives.title: Show Time
passives.text: If Rockstar Foxy is on your team, each coin held increases Overheating duration by 1s.

passives.title: Paper Cuts
passives.text: Attacks apply 25% Bleed for 5s.

passives.title: Paper Pals
passives.text: If any Paperpal unit is in range, this unit gains +25% Damage.

passives.title: Rockstars Assemble
passives.text: When 3 other Rockstar units are in the same loadout, this unit gains -20% CD.

passives.title: Lost Guitar
passives.text: Randomly loses their guitar on the track. While lost, this unit loses 10% Damage and Range. If found manually, this unit gains +30% Damage and Range until guitar is lost again. If not found, the guitar is automatically reclaimed after 30s with no buff.

passives.title: Sheer Stupidity
passives.text: Enemies that come within 50% of this unit's range receive a permanent 10% Slow.

passives.title: Trash Gang
passives.text: If all other Trash Gang members are in range, all Trash Gang members share combined damage and range. All Trash Gang members use the average cooldown of everyone.

passives.title: Cheer
passives.text: Gives all nearby units +20% Damage.

passives.title: Trash Gang
passives.text: If all other Trash Gang members are in range, all Trash Gang members share combined damage and range. All Trash Gang members use the average cooldown of everyone.

passives.title: Clank
passives.text: Every 15s, Stun all enemies in range for 1.5s.

passives.title: Trash Gang
passives.text: If all other Trash Gang members are in range, all Trash Gang members share combined damage and range. All Trash Gang members use the average cooldown of everyone.

passives.title: Rockstars Assemble
passives.text: When 3 other Rockstar units are in the same loadout, this unit gains -20% CD.

passives.title: Wet Floor Sign!
passives.text: Every 10s, place a sign on the track that Stuns enemies that contact it for 1s (max of 3 signs).

passives.title: Mutating Gas
passives.text: Gas surrounds the inner half of this unit's range. Units in range of the gas gain +30% Damage and +5% CD.

passives.title: Wasteland Scavenger
passives.text: Units in range of Mutating Gas are stunned for 5s every 15s. Whenever a unit is stunned in this unit's range, this unit receives +50% Damage for 5s for every stunned unit. Stunned units gain +25% Damage for 10s.

passives.title: Leviathans Grasp
passives.text: Attacks inflict enemies with 30% Bleed for 5s and deal bonus damage equal to Slow% on that enemy. Bleeding enemies in range receive 15% Slow (stacks with other Deep Sea Endos).

passives.title: Anantashesha
passives.text: Attacks Stun enemies for 1.8s. If enemy is in stun lockout, do a follow-up attack to all enemies in range that deals half of this unit's damage. Deal +1 shield damage and this unit does a follow up attack that deals half of this unit's damage on shield break. When enemy gets within half of this unit's range for the first time, that enemy is knocked back 2 tiles. If the enemy is a boss, it is instead Stunned for 2.5s after its current stun lockout ends.

passives.title: Retribution
passives.text: Deals 5x this unit's damage in a line. Applies 20% Slow for 10s. If enemy dies while this slow is still active, summon a Flaming Nightmarionne Plushie with 100% of this unit's damage as health. (Upgrade 0+, Global CD: 90s).

passives.title: The Fallen
passives.text: This unit gains +10% Damage every attack (Max 50%). Once this buff is maxed out, keep maxed buff for 3 attacks and reset. This unit gains +5% Damage for every Dark unit on the team and +5% Range for every Light unit on the team.

passives.title: Call of the Abyss
passives.text: Enemies take +2% damage from this unit (+2.5% if Bleeding) for every second they're within this unit's range (max +150%). When an enemy tries to leave this unit's range for the first time, knock that enemy back 5 tiles, Stun them for 2s, and reset the Call of the Abyss damage buff on that enemy.

passives.title: Apex Predator
passives.text: This unit does +25% damage to Bleeding enemies and its attacks inflict enemies with 25% Bleed for 5s. If there are 3+ sources of Bleed on the enemy, buff this unit's Bleed to 40%. If enemy is in the latter half of the track, this unit does +20% damage and applies an additional 10% Bleed to that enemy.

passives.title: Pump up the Jam
passives.text: This unit gains +1% Damage for every 1% the music setting is turned up.

passives.title: Cymbal Crash
passives.text: Every 10s, deal 2x damage to all enemies in range.

passives.title: Walking Dead
passives.text: Attacks inflict enemies with 25% Bleed and Poison for 5s. When this unit is stunned, its next attack applies an additional 100% Bleed and Poison for 10s, Stuns enemies in range for 1.8s, and Slows enemies in range by 15% for 15s.

passives.title: Machine Learning
passives.text: Every 5s, this unit summons an endo with stats depending on its current upgrade. This unit gains Parts whenever enemies are killed within its range (Boss kills grant 16 Parts). Parts are used to upgrade the Endo summon: Level 1 (50 Parts): Summon has 125% of this unit's damage as health, increased to 150% if another Rust unit is on the team. Level 2 (100 Parts): Summon has 200% of this unit's damage as health and explodes on death for 150% of this unit's damage in a 16 range radius. Level 3 (175 Parts): Summon has 275% of this unit's damage as health, is guaranteed to crit, and explodes for 150% of this unit's damage on death. Additionally, level 3 Endos from this unit applies 15% Exposure to enemies, increasing this units' summons damage to effected enemies within an 18 range radius for 10s.

passives.title: Turning Gears
passives.text: For every Rust element unit in range, this unit gains +2.5% Damage and +3% Range (max +12.5% Damage and +15% Range).

passives.title: Taco Tuesday!
passives.text: This unit gains buffs depending on the chosen filling: Beef - +15% Damage, +15% Range, +5% CD. Chicken - -5% Damage, +5% Dange, -10% CD. Vegan - +25% Damage, +10% Range, +10% CD.

passives.title: Happy Hour
passives.text: This unit gains +50% Damage on odd numbered waves and -30% CD on even numbered waves. Both of these buffs are active at once if a Boss is alive.

passives.title: Tax Return
passives.text: Every 3 waves, automatically upgrade El Chip once. This unit cannot be sold after being placed.

passives.title: Firework Show
passives.text: Every 30s, rotate the current firework color: Red - +50% Damage. Blue - -20% CD. Purple - +50% crit rate and +25% crit damage.

passives.title: Fuse
passives.text: On attack, apply Fuse, exploding after 3s dealing 100% of this unit's damage in a small area. Fuse has bonus effects based on current firework color: Red - Explosion radius increased by 25%. Blue - Detonates a second explosion after 1s dealing 35% damage. Purple - Explosion is guaranteed to crit.

passives.title: Spotlight
passives.text: Light units in range gain +20% Damage. For each Light unit in range, this unit gains +5% Damage (max =50%). If an enemy is within half of this unit's range, this unit gains +50% Damage.

passives.title: Star of the Show
passives.text: +50% crit rate and +50% crit damage. If there is a unit with a higher damage stat in range, gain +25% crit damage and +20% Damage. When another unit in range crits, buff this unit's crit rate by +1% (max +75%). Crit rate over 100% converts directly into crit damage.

passives.title: Decaying Benevolence
passives.text: This unit gains -1% CD every time it attacks (max -20%). After 20 attacks, enemies in range take 30% more damage from DoT effects

passives.title: Arterial Claw
passives.text: This unit does +55% damage to Bleeding enemies and her attacks inflict 45% Bleed for 4s.

passives.title: Hazardous Material
passives.text: Attacks inflict enemies with 50% Poison for 5s. If this unit is stunned, this unit gains +50% Damage for 20s and inflict 500% Poison to all enemies in range for 15s.

passives.title: Growmain Expansion
passives.text: Creates a nature domain in this unit's range for 30s. Nature units in the domain gain +30% Damage and -10% CD. Gaia Chica gains +50% Damage and -15% CD instead. Duration is extended by 1s per stock, up to 15s. The first 3 activations generate +1 stock. (Upgrade 0+, Global CD: 90s).

passives.title: Healing Roots
passives.text: Every 8 kills from Gaia Chica, gain 1 [Healing Root] stack. Each stack prevents 2s of Stun on a unit. A single stun can only be reduced once.

passives.title: Blossom Bloom
passives.text: Every 5s, spawn a rose trap anywhere on the track with 75% of this unit's damage as health, increasing to 100% if spawned during Growmain Expansion (max of 10 rose traps). Rose traps generate +50% income on hit, increasing by +2% per max stock. Rose traps shoot thorns every 3s, dealing 1% of this unit's damage per max stock within 15 range, increasing to 1.5% during Growmain Expansion.

passives.title: Persistent Vines
passives.text: On attack, apply Rooted, applying an increasing Slow at 2%/s. When Rooted reaches 30% Slow, stun the enemy for 1.5s and remove Rooted. If the enemy has stun lockout, deal 200% of this unit's damage instead. When Growmain Expansion is active, Rooted Slow increases 50% faster.

passives.title: Tidal Shift
passives.text: Every 30s, this unit swaps between High Tide and Low Tide. High Tide: +10% Damage and +50% Range. 150° Cone. Low Tide: +50% Damage and +10% Range. 90° Cone. When changing tide, deal 200% of this unit's damage as to all enemies in range and stun enemies hit for 2s. Deals an additional 20% damage per Water unit on the team.

passives.title: Eternal Flow
passives.text: This unit is immune to stuns. This unit gains -3% CD every attack (-15% CD max), which resets when changing target. Every other attack deals +20% damage. If the CD buff is maxed, every attack deals +20% damage.

passives.title: Grōnin
passives.text: When a boss spawns, create a clone of this unit with 33% of this unit's damage. Clone teleports next to the boss when it leaves its range. This unit gains +5% Damage per Nature/Rust unit on the team, +3% per max stock (max +45%) and +2.5% per missing stock (max +30%).

passives.title: Drifter's Blessing
passives.text: When placed, this unit generates an additional stock. Units in range of this unit gain +30% Damage, +25% Range, and -5% CD.

passives.title: Adaptive Tactics
passives.text: When 3+ enemies are in range, this unit gains -40% Damage, +35% Range, -25% CD, and increases its Cone to 210°. After not attacking for 5s, this unit gains +20% Damage for every second that it doesn't attack (max +100% Damage). This buff is removed after 3 attacks. If the damage buff reaches max value, this unit gains +50% Damage and decreases its Cone to 25°.

passives.title: Strength In Numbers
passives.text: For every unit in range, this unit gains +5% Damage and all other units gain +1% Damage.

passives.title: Keep Out
passives.text: Enemies within 60% of this unit's range are Slowed by 30% and take 10% of this unit's damage every second. Once an enemy is 10 studs from the exit, it gets knocked back 3 tiles. If the enemy is a Boss, it is instead Stunned for 2.5s.

passives.title: Closed For Restoration
passives.text: Enemies in the latter half of the track take 25% more damage from this unit. This unit gains +5% Damage per enemy on the track, deals +10% damage to Necromancer enemies and deals +25% damage to their summons.

passives.title: Corrupted Data
passives.text: The first hit this unit does to an enemy deals 2x damage, inflicts 50% Bleed for 5s bypassing DoT immunity, and stuns for 1.5s. Every 10s, this unit gains +50% Damage for 5s.

passives.title: Go Phishing
passives.text: Enemies hit by Corrupted Data permanently generate +20% income and generate +40% income while this unit is hitting them. If the enemy is a Tank, apply a permanent 5% Bleed to that enemy.

name: Trash o Tron
obtainment: Crafted from Trash and the Gang

passives.title: Bits and Bobs
passives.text: Every attack is randomly decided between Electric Pan Hand and Flamethrower. Pan: Line AOE. Stuns for 1.2s. Deals +20% damage. Flamethrower: Wide Cone. Inflicts 50% Burn for 5s. Deals +30% damage to Mystery enemies. Deals 3 hits worth of shield damage. If the same attack happens 3 times in a row, the next attack hits all enemies in range with double damage. Applies the effect of the attack that was not used 3 times at double value where applicable.

passives.title: Assorted Parts
passives.text: Every 3 upgrades, place one of three Trash Gang members as a sub tower with 25% of their normal damage. Trash Gang members in range gain +50% Damage. This unit gains +50% Damage per Trash Gang member in range, up to +300%.

passives.title: Meticulous Study
passives.text: Enemies entering this unit's range for the first time are Stunned for 3s and are inflicted with 25% Wither for 30s.

passives.title: Callings of the Past
passives.text:
Lorekeeper grants different boosts to the team based on the main element of your team that affect units of that element.
● Water: Attacks apply 5% Slow (20% max).
● Dark: Attacks apply 15% Poison for 5s that can't be reapplied until it ends.
● Nature: Grants +1 Stock, then grants +1 bonus Stock when nature units are placed (+5 Stocks max).
● Rust: Attacks apply 10% Wither for 5s that can't be reapplied until it ends.
● Light: Attacks 15% faster.
● Neutral: +15% crit rate and +20% crit damage.
● Fire: Attacks apply +20% more Burn.
● Electric: Attacks Stun for 0.75s (does not bypass lockout).

passives.title: Varity Pack
passives.text: At max upgrade mimic the highest damage and range from nearby towers. Has a set cooldown of 15s. On kill summons 1 cupcake with 25% damage as health.

passives.title: Birthday Boy
passives.text: Nearby units gain +15% Damage, Range, and -5% CD. Cupcake towers receive double this buff.

passives.title: Short Fuse
passives.text: Every 20s, deal 200% of this unit's damage as Full AoE. Damage increases by 20% per Nature unit on the team. Timer decreases by 1.5s per Fire unit on the team. Every second gain +1% Damage (Max 30%). If the team only has Nature and Fire units, gain +1.5% Damage instead (Max 45%). If sold with max buff deal 300% of this unit's damage as Full AoE.

passives.title: Shark Infested Waters
passives.text: Attacks apply 25% Bleed for 5s. All shark towers perform a follow-up automatically on double this units CD, dealing 25% of their damage as Bleed for 5s.

passives.title: Sit for a while
passives.text: If Old Man Consequences is on the team, this unit is free to place and receives double the buffs from Guiding Whistle.

passives.title: You're All Pawns on my Board.
passives.text:
Place up to 5 Chess Pieces on the board. Pieces start as Pawns and promote after earning kills.
𜺗 Pawn: Single target, 80% damage, max 5.
● Knight: Cone 25, 65% damage, applies 15% Bleed for 2s, max 3.
● Rook: Line, 60% damage, Stuns the 3 closest enemies for 1s on its 10th attack, max 1.
● Bishop: Cone 75, 80% damage, attacks apply a secondary piercing shot to 3 enemies for 40% damage, max 2.
● Queen: Cone 180, 50% damage, applies 20% Bleed for 5s, applies 10% Slow for 5s, and Stuns the 5 closest enemies for 1.5s. Max 1.
● King: Full AoE, 65% damage, passively applies 15% Slow to enemies in range, max 1. (Upgrade 0+, Global CD: 0s).

passives.title: Hold the Line!
passives.text: When losing a stock buff all units in range by +10% crit damage. Buff this unit's crit rate by +5%. Stacks up to 3 times

passives.title: Pressing the Advantage
passives.text:
When killing an enemy of any valid element, units of that element gain +35% Damage for 25s. Only one element buff can exist at a time.
Valid elements: Rust, Light, Nature, Water, Fire, and Neutral.

passives.title: Star Spawn
passives.text: Warp a unit in range. Warped units receive +30% Damage, Range, and become Dark/Water. (Upgrade 0+, Local CD: 0s).

passives.title: Depths of Insanity
passives.text: Every 30s, become invisible every other second for 10s (+2s per Warped unit in range). Every time this unit becomes invisible, it gains +2% Damage and Range (Cap of 40%). When there are 3 warped units in range, this unit's attacks Stun for 1s and apply 20% Slow for 5s.

passives.title: Light Eater
passives.text: Attacks apply a 1% stacking Wither (Max 15%). Performs a follow-up attack if an enemy reaches under 35% HP.

passives.title: Star of the Show
passives.text: For every Light element unit in range, attacks ricochet to an additional enemy.

passives.title: Piercing Eyes
passives.text: Enemies in range are Slowed by 1% per second (Max 20%), and receive this unit's damage every 3s, increasing by 10% per repetition (max 200%). This unit's attacks deal +4 shield damage.

passives.title: Figure in the Dark
passives.text:
If other Dark units are on the team:
1+ Dark units: +10% Damage and +5% Range.
3+ Dark units: +50% Damage and +10% Range.
5 Dark units: +100% Damage and +20% Range.
At 5+ Dark units: Enemies in range take 25% more damage from Dark units.
